examples.sentence: During the meeting, Sarah decided to be on the front foot by proposing new ideas before anyone else could speak.
examples.translation: During the meeting, Sarah decided to be proactive by proposing new ideas before anyone else could speak.

examples.sentence: If you want to succeed in negotiations, you have to stay on the front foot and anticipate your opponent’s moves.
examples.translation: If you want to succeed in negotiations, you have to stay proactive and anticipate your opponent’s moves.

examples.sentence: The marketing team has been on the front foot this quarter, launching campaigns ahead of schedule to capture the market.
examples.translation: The marketing team has been proactive this quarter, launching campaigns ahead of schedule to capture the market.

examples.sentence: In boxing, positioning yourself on the front foot allows you to deliver stronger punches with more reach.
examples.translation: In boxing, placing your body weight on the front foot allows you to deliver stronger punches with more reach.

examples.sentence: He was coached to keep his balance on the front foot when swinging the golf club for greater power.
examples.translation: He was coached to keep his balance with body weight on the front foot when swinging the golf club for greater power.

examples.sentence: When running downhill, athletes often lean on the front foot to maintain speed and control.
examples.translation: When running downhill, athletes often shift their weight onto the front foot to maintain speed and control.

examples.sentence: The tennis player’s stance on the front foot helped her generate forward momentum for aggressive shots.
examples.translation: The tennis player’s stance with weight on the front foot helped her generate forward momentum for aggressive shots.

examples.sentence: Jake was really on the game during yesterday’s chess tournament, anticipating every move with precision.
examples.translation: Jake was mentally focused during yesterday’s chess tournament, anticipating every move with precision.

examples.sentence: You need to be on the game if you want to keep up with the fast pace of this coding challenge.
examples.translation: You need to be mentally focused if you want to keep up with the fast pace of this coding challenge.

examples.sentence: She wasn’t on the game at all during the presentation and kept losing her train of thought.
examples.translation: She wasn’t mentally focused at all during the presentation and kept losing her train of thought.

examples.sentence: Rumors spread that she’s been on the game to support herself since moving to the city.
examples.translation: Rumors spread that she’s been engaged in prostitution to support herself since moving to the city.

examples.sentence: He warned his brother about the dangers of going on the game at such a young age.
examples.translation: He warned his brother about the dangers of working in the sex trade at such a young age.

examples.sentence: After losing her job, she found herself on the game for a short time before getting help.
examples.translation: After losing her job, she found herself engaged in prostitution for a short time before getting help.

examples.sentence: Coach reminded the players to stay on the game and not get distracted by the crowd noise.
examples.translation: Coach reminded the players to pay attention to immediate tactics and not get distracted by the crowd noise.

examples.sentence: If you want to win this round, you have to be on the game and focus on your strategy, not the distractions.
examples.translation: If you want to win this round, you have to pay attention to your immediate objectives and not the distractions.

examples.sentence: Despite the chaos around him, the detective stayed on the game and followed the clues carefully.
examples.translation: Despite the chaos around him, the detective paid attention to immediate objectives and followed the clues carefully.

examples.sentence: The hustlers on the corner were definitely on the game, quick to spot any opportunity for a deal.
examples.translation: The hustlers on the corner were definitely active in their street trade, quick to spot any opportunity for a deal.

examples.sentence: After his release, he went right back on the game, working the streets as before.
examples.translation: After his release, he went right back to participating in street-level criminal activity.

examples.sentence: She warned him that once you’re on the game, it’s hard to get out without serious consequences.
examples.translation: She warned him that once you’re involved in street hustling, it’s hard to get out without serious consequences.

examples.sentence: Late at night, the police found several people on the game, walking the streets in a suspicious manner.
examples.translation: Late at night, the police found several people physically on the street, engaged in street-level activity.

examples.sentence: The city council increased patrols to monitor those on the game in the downtown area after dark.
examples.translation: The city council increased patrols to monitor people physically on the street in the downtown area after dark.

examples.sentence: She was spotted on the game near the station, raising concerns among local residents.
examples.translation: She was spotted physically on the street near the station, raising concerns among local residents.

examples.sentence: During the protest, many youths were on the game, moving through the streets and chanting slogans.
examples.translation: During the protest, many youths were physically on the street, moving through the streets and chanting slogans.

examples.sentence: Maria is always on the go, juggling work, family, and her volunteer commitments without missing a beat.
examples.translation: Maria is continuously active, juggling work, family, and her volunteer commitments without missing a beat.

examples.sentence: I’ve been on the go all day, running errands and attending meetings back-to-back.
examples.translation: I’ve been constantly busy all day, running errands and attending meetings back-to-back.

examples.sentence: If you’re on the go like that, make sure to take a moment to rest and recharge.
examples.translation: If you’re continuously active like that, make sure to take a moment to rest and recharge.

examples.sentence: She’s on the go again, traveling from New York to Chicago with barely a pause in between.
examples.translation: She’s in motion again, traveling from New York to Chicago with barely a pause in between.

examples.sentence: I usually eat breakfast on the go since my mornings are so hectic and I’m always out the door early.
examples.translation: I usually eat breakfast while traveling or moving because my mornings are so hectic.

examples.sentence: The mobile office setup lets employees be on the go and still stay connected to their projects.
examples.translation: The mobile office setup lets employees function while moving or away from home and still stay connected to their projects.

examples.sentence: He was answering emails on the go between appointments, making sure nothing slipped through the cracks.
examples.translation: He was doing something while moving from place to place, answering emails between appointments.

examples.sentence: It’s hard to prepare a proper meal when you’re always on the go, so I rely on quick snacks instead.
examples.translation: It’s hard to prepare a proper meal when you’re always moving from place to place, so I rely on quick snacks instead.

examples.sentence: She manages to keep up with her studies on the go by listening to lectures during her commute.
examples.translation: She manages to keep up with her studies while moving from place to place by listening to lectures during her commute.

examples.sentence: The hikers were on the go from dawn until dusk, covering miles through the forest trails.
examples.translation: The hikers were physically in motion from dawn until dusk, covering miles through the forest trails.

examples.sentence: During the marathon, the runners stayed on the go despite the sweltering heat and fatigue.
examples.translation: During the marathon, the runners stayed physically moving despite the sweltering heat and fatigue.

examples.sentence: You could see the delivery trucks constantly on the go, navigating through the busy city streets.
examples.translation: You could see the delivery trucks physically moving constantly, navigating through the busy city streets.

examples.sentence: The children were on the go all afternoon, playing tag and running around the playground.
examples.translation: The children were physically moving all afternoon, playing tag and running around the playground.

examples.sentence: I love the new proposal, but on the gripping hand, it might stretch our budget too thin this quarter.
examples.translation: I love the new proposal, but on the other hand, it might stretch our budget too thin this quarter.

examples.sentence: The house is in a great location; on the gripping hand, it needs quite a bit of renovation work.
examples.translation: The house is in a great location; on the other hand, it needs quite a bit of renovation work.

examples.sentence: He seemed confident about the plan, but on the gripping hand, there were some risks we couldn’t ignore.
examples.translation: He seemed confident about the plan, but on the other hand, there were some risks we couldn’t ignore.

examples.sentence: The project might save money, but on the gripping hand, it could alienate some clients with the changes.
examples.translation: The project might save money, but on the other hand, it could alienate some clients with the changes.

examples.sentence: We could hire more staff to ease the workload; on the gripping hand, that would increase overhead costs significantly.
examples.translation: We could hire more staff to ease the workload; on the other hand, that would increase overhead costs significantly.

examples.sentence: On the gripping hand, taking a break now might delay the deadline, but it would improve overall quality.
examples.translation: On the other hand, taking a break now might delay the deadline, but it would improve overall quality.

examples.sentence: She held the cup in her right hand; on the gripping hand was a small scar from a childhood accident.
examples.translation: She held the cup in her right hand; on the other hand was a small scar from a childhood accident.

examples.sentence: The watch was worn on the left wrist, while on the gripping hand he wore a simple silver ring.
examples.translation: The watch was worn on the left wrist, while on the other hand he wore a simple silver ring.

examples.sentence: He injured his right hand during the match; on the gripping hand, he was still able to throw accurately.
examples.translation: He injured his right hand during the match; on the other hand, he was still able to throw accurately.

examples.sentence: The tattoo on his left hand was intricate, and on the gripping hand, a matching design was just as detailed.
examples.translation: The tattoo on his left hand was intricate, and on the other hand, a matching design was just as detailed.

examples.sentence: The new product launch came on the heels of several successful marketing campaigns.
examples.translation: The new product launch immediately followed several successful marketing campaigns.

examples.sentence: On the heels of the storm, the city began cleanup efforts to restore normalcy quickly.
examples.translation: Immediately after the storm, the city began cleanup efforts to restore normalcy quickly.

examples.sentence: The announcement came on the heels of months of speculation among industry insiders.
examples.translation: The announcement occurred immediately after months of speculation among industry insiders.

examples.sentence: The police car was right on the heels of the suspect as he sped through the alleyways.
examples.translation: The police car was close behind the suspect as he sped through the alleyways.

examples.sentence: During the race, the second runner stayed on the heels of the leader, waiting for an opening.
examples.translation: During the race, the second runner stayed physically close behind the leader, waiting for an opening.

examples.sentence: The hounds were on the heels of the fox, tracking it through the dense forest.
examples.translation: The hounds were close behind the fox, tracking it through the dense forest.

examples.sentence: The new policies came on the heels of increased public demand for environmental action.
examples.translation: The new policies closely followed and resulted from increased public demand for environmental action.

examples.sentence: On the heels of the scandal, the company faced numerous lawsuits and regulatory investigations.
examples.translation: Closely associated with the scandal, the company faced numerous lawsuits and regulatory investigations.

examples.sentence: The victory was on the heels of months of intense training and preparation by the team.
examples.translation: The victory happened as a direct consequence of months of intense training and preparation by the team.

examples.sentence: The cyclist rode on the heels of the leader, trying to conserve energy for the final sprint.
examples.translation: The cyclist rode immediately following behind the leader in position.

examples.sentence: The parade floats moved on the heels of each other down the main street, creating a continuous procession.
examples.translation: The parade floats moved immediately following behind one another down the main street.

examples.sentence: The runner stayed on the heels of the pace car to avoid leading the pack too early.
examples.translation: The runner stayed immediately behind the pace car in position.

examples.sentence: The convoy proceeded on the heels of the scouting team to ensure the route was secure.
examples.translation: The convoy moved immediately following behind the scouting team to ensure the route was secure.

examples.sentence: The acrobat balanced carefully on the high rope, captivating the audience with every step.
examples.translation: The acrobat was situated on a high rope, captivating the audience with every step.

examples.sentence: She felt dizzy while standing on the high rope, but kept her focus to complete the routine safely.
examples.translation: She felt dizzy while standing on the high rope but kept her focus to complete the routine safely.

examples.sentence: They practiced for hours on the high rope before the big circus performance in front of thousands.
examples.translation: They practiced for hours on a high rope before the big circus performance in front of thousands.

examples.sentence: The child took a cautious step forward while on the high rope during the beginner’s class.
examples.translation: The child took a cautious step forward while physically on the high rope during the beginner’s class.

examples.sentence: Taking that financial risk is like being on the high rope—you could lose everything if you slip up.
examples.translation: Taking that financial risk is like being in a precarious, risky position—you could lose everything if you slip up.

examples.sentence: With the company’s future uncertain, the CEO admitted they were on the high rope trying to navigate the crisis.
examples.translation: With the company’s future uncertain, the CEO admitted they were in a risky situation trying to navigate the crisis.

examples.sentence: She felt like she was on the high rope every day managing the conflicting demands of work and family.
examples.translation: She felt like she was in a precarious position every day managing the conflicting demands of work and family.

examples.sentence: The surgeon was on the high rope during the delicate operation, aware that any mistake could be fatal.
examples.translation: The surgeon was operating under pressure during the delicate operation, aware that any mistake could be fatal.

examples.sentence: When negotiating the contract, the lawyer was definitely on the high rope, balancing tough demands with diplomacy.
examples.translation: When negotiating the contract, the lawyer was under pressure, balancing tough demands with diplomacy.

examples.sentence: Pilots flying through stormy weather are on the high rope, relying on skill and caution to keep everyone safe.
examples.translation: Pilots flying through stormy weather are in a situation requiring exceptional skill and caution to keep everyone safe.

examples.sentence: During the team-building retreat, everyone spent the afternoon on the high ropes, challenging their balance and courage.
examples.translation: During the team-building retreat, everyone participated in a high ropes course involving climbing and balance challenges.

examples.sentence: Amy was nervous at first but felt a huge sense of accomplishment after completing the obstacles on the high ropes.
examples.translation: Amy was nervous at first but felt a huge sense of accomplishment after completing the challenges on the high ropes course.

examples.sentence: The children were harnessed safely as they moved carefully on the high ropes during the outdoor adventure.
examples.translation: The children were safely secured as they moved on the elevated ropes and platforms during the outdoor adventure.

examples.sentence: It took teamwork and trust to get everyone through the high ropes course without any accidents.
examples.translation: It took teamwork and trust to complete the elevated rope course without any accidents.

examples.sentence: With the company facing bankruptcy, the board felt like they were on the high ropes, needing support to stay afloat.
examples.translation: With the company facing bankruptcy, the board felt in a precarious situation, needing support to stay afloat.

examples.sentence: After the scandal, the politician was on the high ropes and relied heavily on advisors to navigate the fallout.
examples.translation: After the scandal, the politician was in a challenging situation and relied heavily on advisors to navigate the fallout.

examples.sentence: Negotiating the contract without legal counsel put her on the high ropes, risking mistakes with serious consequences.
examples.translation: Negotiating the contract without legal counsel put her in a risky position, risking mistakes with serious consequences.

examples.sentence: I often eat lunch on the hoof between meetings because my schedule is so tight.
examples.translation: I often eat lunch quickly or without formal preparation between meetings because my schedule is so tight.

examples.sentence: She gave a quick report on the hoof during the conference call while simultaneously replying to emails.
examples.translation: She gave a quick report informally during the conference call while simultaneously replying to emails.

examples.sentence: The journalist wrote notes on the hoof during the event, capturing details as they happened.
examples.translation: The journalist wrote notes quickly and informally during the event, capturing details as they happened.

examples.sentence: The farmer sold the cattle on the hoof, valuing them while they were still alive rather than after slaughter.
examples.translation: The farmer sold the livestock alive, valuing them on the hoof rather than after slaughter.

examples.sentence: Prices for sheep on the hoof tend to fluctuate depending on seasonal demand and feed availability.
examples.translation: Prices for live sheep vary depending on seasonal demand and feed availability.

examples.sentence: They inspected the pigs on the hoof before deciding which ones to take to market.
examples.translation: They inspected the live pigs before deciding which ones to take to market.

examples.sentence: Trading livestock on the hoof requires knowledge of animal health and market trends.
examples.translation: Trading live animals requires knowledge of their health and market trends.

examples.sentence: After signing the contract, the company was on the hook for all the expenses related to the project.
examples.translation: After signing the contract, the company was legally liable for all the expenses related to the project.

examples.sentence: If the product fails, the manufacturer will be on the hook for repairs and replacements.
examples.translation: If the product fails, the manufacturer will be financially responsible for repairs and replacements.

examples.sentence: The landlord said we’d be on the hook for any damages caused during our tenancy.
examples.translation: The landlord said we would be responsible for any damages caused during our tenancy.

examples.sentence: I’m really on the hook for organizing the event since everyone else is busy with other tasks.
examples.translation: I’m obliged to organize the event since everyone else is busy with other tasks.

examples.sentence: Once you agree to cover the shift, you’re on the hook and can’t back out without consequences.
examples.translation: Once you agree to cover the shift, you’re obliged and can’t back out without consequences.

examples.sentence: She found herself on the hook to pay off the debt after co-signing the loan for her friend.
examples.translation: She was compelled to pay off the debt after co-signing the loan for her friend.

examples.sentence: The fish was still on the hook when he pulled it out of the water after a long struggle.
examples.translation: The fish was literally caught on the fishhook when he pulled it out of the water after a long struggle.

examples.sentence: Be careful not to get your clothes on the hook when you’re baiting the fishing line.
examples.translation: Be careful not to catch your clothes on the fishhook when you’re baiting the fishing line.

examples.sentence: The crab got stuck on the hook and didn’t manage to escape before the net was pulled in.
examples.translation: The crab was literally attached to the hook and didn’t escape before the net was pulled in.

examples.sentence: After a few bites, the angler finally had a trout firmly on the hook.
examples.translation: After a few bites, the angler finally had a trout physically caught on the fishhook.
